no: Chinese-language only. Similar to AutoDescription — scans all items and spells and regenerates their descriptions to match actual in-game stats. Includes a Chinese garbled text (encoding) fixer. Install after all content mods.
sum: Chinese-language equivalent of AutoDescription. Scans all items and spells and regenerates descriptions to match actual stats. Includes Chinese encoding fixer. Install after all content mods.

co.n: Fix Chinese garbled text entries (optional encoding repair)
co.no: Scans dialog.tlk for ANSI encoding issues in Chinese text and repairs them. Optional — mainly for multi-mod integrations.

co.n: Item descriptions: Skip tedious details (remove spell, set state, etc.)
Spell descriptions (registered spells only): Show all details
co.no: Only processes registered spells (spellbook and some vanilla special abilities). Shows min/max level effects for scaling spells.

co.n: Spell descriptions (registered spells only): Skip tedious details
Spell descriptions (all spells): Show all details
Spell descriptions (all spells): Skip tedious details
